---
title: "Trishna Saikia"
pagetitle: "Trishna Saikia"
subtitle: "PhD Researcher in Computer Vision, Physiological Computing, and Healthcare AI"
image: assets/img/Profile_2.png
image-alt: "Portrait of Trishna Saikia"

twitter-card:
  title: Trishna Saikia
  description: |
    PhD researcher working on machine learning, computer vision, multimodal learning, and physiological computing.
  image: assets/img/Profile_2.png

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 22em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/trishnasaikia/

    - icon: github
      aria-label: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/TrishnaSaikia

    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      aria-label: "Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=G6G8ir0AAAAJ

    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      aria-label: "ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3052-1689

    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}}"
      aria-label: "Email"
      href: mailto:trishnasaikia2521@gmail.com

page-layout: full

execute:
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">

resources:
  - assets/index.css
---

<br><br>

::: {#hero-heading}

I am a final-year PhD researcher in Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Indore. My research lies at the intersection of machine learning, computer vision, multimodal learning, and physiological computing.

My work focuses on extracting physiological and behavioral information from videos and biosignals for applications in healthcare, including heart rate, blood pressure, respiration, oxygen saturation, and pain analysis.

I am a Prime Minister Research Fellow (PMRF), an India RISE Fellow, and currently a Visiting Research Scholar at the University of Turku, Finland.

[Learn more about me &rarr;](about/index.html){.about-links .subtitle}

:::
<!-- hero-heading -->
